Composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and complete the backend code in main.py
- Ensure all routing functions correctly serve the nine frontend pages as per the requirements.
- Fix the issue causing `jinja2.exceptions.TemplateNotFound  dashboard.html` by verifying the template loading mechanism and ensuring the backend correctly references the templates.
- Confirm that the backend passes all necessary data to the frontend templates for rendering.
- Maintain the original task's requirement  no authentication required; all features directly accessible.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure that the backend routes and data structures align with the frontend templates' expectations.
Composition.Programmer 2:
Develop and complete all nine frontend HTML templates in the 'templates/' directory
- Implement the HTML templates  dashboard.html, auction_catalog.html, auction_details.html, place_bid.html, bid_history.html, auction_categories.html, winners.html, trending_auctions.html, auction_status.html.
- Ensure all specified elements with their IDs are present exactly as defined in the requirements document for frontend rendering and interaction.
- Use the backend routes defined by Programmer 1 for all URLs in the templates; do not use direct HTML file names.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm data passed from backend matches template variables and structure.
- Coordinate with Programmer 3 to ensure that static assets (CSS, JS, images) are correctly referenced in the templates.
Composition.Programmer 3:
Develop static assets in the 'static/' directory
- Implement CSS styling in static/css/styles.css to ensure consistent and user-friendly UI design across all pages.
- Implement JavaScript interactivity in static/js/scripts.js for client-side features such as button actions, filtering, sorting, and dynamic content updates without full page reloads.
- Organize and include all auction item images in static/images/ as referenced by the image_url field in auctions data.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure static assets are properly linked and used in the frontend templates.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of all pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
